II)] डा. बी. राजेT0, संयु;त सचव "टiपण: मूल अधसूचना भारत के राजप, असाधारण, भाग II, खंड 3, उपखंड (i) सा.का.5न. संjयांक 301, तार$ख 27 फरवर$, 1971 8वारा 'काFशत क1 गई थी और अं5तम संशोधन का.आ. संjयांक 494 (अ) तार$ख 29 जनवर$, 2018 8वारा  कया गया । MINISTRY OF AGRICULTURE AND FARMERS WELFARE (Department of Agriculture, Cooperation and Farmers Welfare) NOTIFICATION New Delhi, the 12th April, 2018 S.O. 1630(E).—In exercise of the powers conferred by section 4 of the Insecticides Act, 1968 (46 of 1968), the Central Government hereby makes the following further amendments in the notification of the Government of India in the erstwhile Ministry of Food, Agriculture, Community Development and Cooperation, published in Gazette of India, Extraordinary, Part II, Section 3, Sub-section (i), number G.S.R. 301, dated the 27th February, 1971, namely:- In the said notification, (1) for item (xiv) and the entries relating thereto, the following item and entries shall be substituted, namely:- -- 2 of 3 -- ¹Hkkx IIμ[k.M 3(ii)º Hkkjr dk jkti=k % vlk/kj.k 3 “(xiv) Dr. Jitendra Kumar, Director, Institute of Pesticide Formulation Technology, Sector-20, Udyog Vihar, Gurugram-122016. (For a period of three years from the date of publication of this notification)”; (2) for item (xix) (b) and the entries relating thereto, the following item and entries shall be substituted, namely:- “(xix) (b) Dr. Kamalesh Sarkar, Scientist G and Director, National Institute of Occupational Health, Meghani Nagar, Ahmedabad-380016. (For a period of three years from the date of publication of this notification)”. (3) for item (xxi) and the entries relating thereto, the following item and entries shall be substituted, namely:- “(xxi) Dr. Suneel Pandey, Director, The Energy and Resources Institute, Darbari Seth Block, India Habitat Centre, Lodhi Road, New Delhi-110003. (For a period of three years from the date of publication of this notification)”. [F.No. 19-6/2008-PP-I (vol. II)] Dr. B. RAJENDER, Jt. Secy. Note: The principal notification was published in the Gazette of India, Extraordinary, Part II, Section 3, Sub- section (i) vide number G.S.R. 301, dated the 27th February, 1971 and last amended vide number S.O. 494 (E), dated the 29th January, 2018.
